childRunId.description: The runId of the child run on the target canvas.

terminalStatus.description: Only set when config.awaitTerminal=true. `pending` indicates timeout before terminal; child run continues independently.

result.description: Child run's terminal output. Only present when terminalStatus === 'completed'. Shape determined by the child workflow.

circuitOpen.description: When true, the circuit breaker rejected this call without invoking the child. Workflow authors branch to fallback when this fires.
